#!/usr/bin/env python3
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from transformers import CLIPVisionModel, CLIPConfig

class WildlifeClassifier(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_classes=182, clip_model_name='openai/clip-vit-large-patch14'):
        super().__init__()
        self.clip_vision = CLIPVisionModel.from_pretrained(clip_model_name)
        
        # Freeze CLIP vision encoder initially
        for param in self.clip_vision.parameters():
            param.requires_grad = False
            
        # Add classification head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.clip_vision.config.hidden_size, num_classes)
        )
        
    def forward(self, pixel_values):
        # Get CLIP features
        outputs = self.clip_vision(pixel_values=pixel_values)
        pooled_output = outputs.pooler_output  # Use pooled output
        
        # Pass through classifier
        logits = self.classifier(pooled_output)
        return logits
